item.title:
TradFi Perps are now on Copy Trading.

item.description:
TradFi Perps are now on Copy Trading.
Lead traders can trade them. Copy traders can now add them to their portfolios.
Explore now → https://t.co/4sB8FTfie2 https://t.co/UVQADJathb
--- @binance | ❤️ 47 | 🔁 4 | 💬 23 | 👁 5313

item.title: I have one even better: post it on social media and wait for the comments.
